reviews.review_description: i love this game sooo much i wish they could have a update where you could change your cat skin and also go to the big island next to the city i tried to go to the big island but there is a invisible wall i hope they have a update where you can go to the big island.
Relived my childhood moments of crawling on the floor, begging for attention. Like a cat.

reviews.review_title: This game has a lot of potential!
reviews.review_description:
It's a very interesting I am Cat-like game.
It's an open-world game set in a cute but somewhat dark town, and the game involves solving problems for the townspeople, but it seems like there are a lot of hidden elements as well, so I think it will get even more interesting with future updates.
Also, as the day changes, I thought it was interesting to be able to enjoy those changes.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your affirmation. We are planning a new version of the content with more interaction, plot, and animals. Hope you will enjoy it！
/ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\

reviews.review_description: What’s with the language on here?

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for the feedback!Could you share more details about what you meant? We’d love to improve things as much as we can!

reviews.review_description: Tutorial keeps repeating and we can’t get to the actual game… how do we bypass this?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. Before we deal with the situation you described, do we need to confirm two questions：
1. Have you been following the guide line all the way to the finish line?
2. Have you reached the end of the Tutorial, climbed up a high platform, jumped down, and walked towards a bright spot deep in the forest?

At the same time, we have also replied to you in the email and attached screenshots for reference. I hope it can help us solve this problem faster

Best wishes！  

/ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\
